risks.description: A hard operating rule is omitted or compressed ambiguously.
risks.mitigation: Classify as P0 and preserve verbatim.

risks.description: A failed, pending, or skipped validation disappears from the handoff.
risks.mitigation: Preserve command and status in Validation Evidence.

risks.description: The next session cannot tell what to do first.
risks.mitigation: Include a concrete next action in Rehydration Prompt.

risks.description: A secret is copied verbatim into the packet.
risks.mitigation: Redact the secret and preserve only source guidance.

block_when: P0 item has no source or evidence tag
rehydration prompt lacks repo, branch, objective, or next action
